seo_title: Tirzepatide vs Semaglutide for Women Over 40: Differences and What to Expect
meta_description: Comparing tirzepatide (Zepbound/Mounjaro) and semaglutide (Wegovy/Ozempic) for women over 40? This evidence-based guide covers key differences, trial data, and what perimenopausal women need to know.
